profiles.title: TikTok Usernames
profiles.description: TikTok usernames to analyze (without @). Example: charlidamelio

videoUrls.title: TikTok Video URLs
videoUrls.description: Specific TikTok video URLs to analyze. Example: https://www.tiktok.com/@user/video/1234567890

analysisDepth.title: Analysis Depth
analysisDepth.description: How deep to analyze each profile
enumTitles: Quick - Profile stats + top metrics only
Standard - Stats + recent videos + engagement analysis
Deep - Full analysis with posting patterns and content themes

maxVideosPerProfile.title: Max Videos Per Profile
maxVideosPerProfile.description: Maximum number of recent videos to analyze per profile

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Proxy settings for accessing TikTok (recommended for reliability)
proxyConfig.sectionDescription: TikTok may block requests without proxies. Using Apify residential proxies is recommended.
